decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id 'project_utica-ave-bus-priority-safety-study' matches the existing registry record exactly — same project name ('Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study'), same source_id listed in the registry card's source_ids, same borough (Brooklyn), same project_type (study). The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id, so per the rule against linking to one's own base_record_id, the decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study
Study goals – Improve pedestrian and driver safety – Improve bus travel times – Maintain parking and curb access
